en: A good name is to be chosen rather than great riches, and favor is better than silver or gold.
zh: 名譽勝過多財， 恩寵勝過金銀。

en: The rich and the poor meet together; the LORD is the maker of them all.
zh: 世上有財主，也有窮人， 兩者都是耶和華所造的。

en: The prudent sees danger and hides himself, but the simple go on and suffer for it.
zh: 精明人看見災禍，就躲藏起來； 愚蒙人卻往前走，自取禍害。

en: The reward for humility and fear of the LORD is riches and honor and life.
zh: 謙卑和敬畏耶和華的賞賜， 就是財富、榮耀和生命。

en: Thorns and snares are in the way of the crooked; whoever guards his soul will keep far from them.
zh: 奸詐人的道路，滿布荊棘和網羅； 謹慎自己的，必遠離這些。

en: Train up a child in the way he should go; even when he is old he will not depart from it.
zh: 教養孩童走他當行的路， 就是到老，他也不會偏離。

en: The rich rules over the poor, and the borrower is the slave of the lender.
zh: 財主管轄窮人， 欠債的作債主的奴僕。

en: Whoever sows injustice will reap calamity, and the rod of his fury will fail.
zh: 散播邪惡的，必收禍害； 他忿怒的杖終必毀掉。

en: Whoever has a bountiful eye will be blessed, for he shares his bread with the poor.
zh: 心存良善看人的，必蒙賜福； 因為他把自己的食物分給窮人。

en: Drive out a scoffer, and strife will go out, and quarreling and abuse will cease.
zh: 趕走好譏笑人的，紛爭就除去； 爭執和恥辱也必止息。

en: He who loves purity of heart, and whose speech is gracious, will have the king as his friend.
zh: 喜愛內心潔淨，嘴上有恩言的， 君王要作他的朋友。

en: The eyes of the LORD keep watch over knowledge, but he overthrows the words of the traitor.
zh: 耶和華的眼目護衛知識， 卻傾覆奸詐人的話。

en: The sluggard says, "There is a lion outside! I shall be killed in the streets!"
zh: 懶惰人說：“外面有獅子， 我在街上必被殺害。”

en: The mouth of forbidden women is a deep pit; he with whom the LORD is angry will fall into it.
zh: 淫婦的口是深坑， 耶和華所惱恨的必陷在其中。

en: Folly is bound up in the heart of a child, but the rod of discipline drives it far from him.
zh: 愚妄束縛孩童的心， 管教的杖可以把愚妄遠遠驅除。

en: Whoever oppresses the poor to increase his own wealth, or gives to the rich, will only come to poverty.
zh: 欺壓窮人為要增加自己財富的， 送禮給財主的，必致窮乏。

en: Incline your ear, and hear the words of the wise, and apply your heart to my knowledge,
zh: 你要留心聽智慧人的言語， 專心領受我的知識。

en: for it will be pleasant if you keep them within you, if all of them are ready on your lips.
zh: 如果你心裡謹守， 嘴唇上常常誦念這一切，自會覺得甘美。

en: That your trust may be in the LORD, I have made them known to you today, even to you.
zh: 我今日特別指教你， 為要使你倚靠耶和華。

en: Have I not written for you thirty sayings of counsel and knowledge,
zh: 我不是曾經給你們寫下 有關謀略和知識的事嗎？

en: to make you know what is right and true, that you may give a true answer to those who sent you?
zh: 要教你認識確實的真理， 使你把真理回覆那差派你來的人。

en: Do not rob the poor, because he is poor, or crush the afflicted at the gate,
zh: 你不可因為貧窮人窮乏，就搶奪他的東西， 也不可在城門口欺壓窮苦人。

en: for the LORD will plead their cause and rob of life those who rob them.
zh: 因為耶和華必為他們伸冤， 搶奪他們的，耶和華也必奪取那人的性命。

en: Make no friendship with a man given to anger, nor go with a wrathful man,
zh: 容易發怒的人，不要與他為友； 脾氣暴躁的人，不要與他來往，

en: lest you learn his ways and entangle yourself in a snare.
zh: 免得你效法他的行徑， 自己就陷在網羅裡。

en: Be not one of those who give pledges, who put up security for debts.
zh: 不要替別人擊掌擔保， 也不可為欠債的作保證人。

en: If you have nothing with which to pay, why should your bed be taken from under you?
zh: 如果你沒有甚麼可以償還， 何必使人連你睡覺的床也奪去呢？

en: Do not move the ancient landmark that your fathers have set.
zh: 你的祖先立定古時的地界， 你不可遷移。

en: Do you see a man skillful in his work? He will stand before kings; he will not stand before obscure men.
zh: 你見過辦事能幹的人嗎？ 他必侍立在君王面前， 必不會侍立在低微的人面前。
